title: Extract or inline a function safely
description: Perform an extract/inline by moving code without altering behavior, checking captured state, side effects, and all call sites.
body: Steps: 1. Identify the exact code block and the variables it reads and writes. 2. For extraction, pass reads as parameters and return writes; preserve side-effect order and early returns. 3. For inlining, substitute the body at each call site, watching for shared mutable state and naming collisions. 4. Run the behavior/characterization tests. 5. Confirm no change to outputs, exceptions, or ordering. Rollback point: before touching the first call site. Validation: tests are green before and after with identical behavior; an extraction that changes evaluation order or drops a side effect is not behavior-preserving and must be reverted.
